/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/hermes_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/NetworkBackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/hermes_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_Hermes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hermes_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hermes_qml/Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hermes_qml/TopBar_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hermes_qml/MapView_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hermes_qml/SettingsPanel_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_hermes_raw_qml_0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_hermes_icons.cpp.o -o hermes  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Svg.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
